Solution

## Swift Fault Clearing & Minimum Interruptions

Keep the power on even with electrical faults happening in the system. Ensure faster recovery from these faults with Care Labs’ relay coordination study services for Indonesian facilities.

Support

## Unified Support For Accurate Analysis & Seamless Compliance

At Care Labs, we follow a comprehensive support framework for ensuring the results that clients desire. We guarantee you get the best value for the investment.

Technical Support:

Care Labs’ team has the technical expertise in using advanced technology like ETAP to generate accurate results. With simulations and recommendations, you get more than just a report.

Safety And Compliance Support:

We can bridge the compliance gaps with the right knowledge of local as well as global standards like PLN standards, IEEE, and IEC.

Technology

## Power Tool For Safer Systems- ETAP

Care Labs uses the ETAP software suite for protection coordination, offering intuitive TCC plotting, simulations, and compliance with standards like IEC, IEEE, and Indonesian codes for relay coordination. Know how it can help you in perfecting your protective relays.

System

## Every Device Protected, Every Fault Rectified

Protecting critical devices from cascading faults requires comprehensive and accurate analysis. From nodes to major assets, our relay coordination study in Indonesia covers it all.

Industries

## Industries We Support

Study of sustainability research studies on increasing energy requirements and the protection of key assets in the industry.
